subject: Fix Jenkins build
commit_message:
Fix Jenkins build

Daily Jenkins build has started to fail due to missing interim versions. For example, if version is 1.1.2-SNAPSHOT and version 1.1.1 is not found, build fails.  Workaround is to remain on version 1.1.0-SNAPSHOT on seed code

Issue: SDNC-42
Change-Id: Id0e9ba30001d9a1568fa132f68ba837a437c5d81
Signed-off-by: Dan Timoney <dtimoney@att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/sdnc-core-master-verify-java-skip-tests/125/ : FAILURE

Build failed to find artifact org.openecomp.sdnc.core:root:pom:1.1.1 needed for sub-project org.openecomp.sdnc.core:sli-common:bundle:1.1.0-SNAPSHOT: Failed to collect dependencies at org.openecomp.sdnc.core:dblib-provider:jar:1.1.1-SNAPSHOT: Failed to read artifact descriptor for org.openecomp.sdnc.core:dblib-provider:jar:1.1.1-SNAPSHOT. Check correct groupId, artifactId and version. This may also indicate a problem with nexus. Another possibility is that this is a -SNAPSHOT version and it has expired from nexus -- in that case check with the project which provides the artifact. ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/sdnc-core-master-verify-java-skip-tests/125/ )
